text:
Family Portrait is the 36th episode of Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood.

Episode Notes

This episode is adapted from content in Chapter 67: Burgeoning Borders, Chapter 68: Portrait of a Family and Chapter 69: The Foundation of Briggs.
It's in this episode that it's revealed Hohenheim's face from the only and enigmatic Elric's family picture.
The same photography has always show up in the franchise recurrently, even in the alternative adaptation. But until this episode, the reason for the lack of the character's face was unknown.
